summary: Iteration 2 (Nearest Hub + EV List → Price Calculator → Billing flow) was tested end-to-end on the Expo web preview at 390x844 with viewport mobile sizing. ALL 11 listed acceptance criteria PASS: (1) `nearest-hub-button` shows 'Nearest Hub · 4 EVs' in the top bar of home; (2) tapping it expands the bottom sheet with `hub-evs-heading` = 'AVAILABLE EVS · 2' and renders `hub-ev-veh-1` and `hub-ev-veh-2`; (3) tapping `hub-ev-veh-1` navigates to /price-calculator?vehicleId=veh-1&hubId=hub-1, `ev-tilt-card` and `checkout-button` render; (4) all four plans (plan-30m, plan-1h, plan-4h, plan-1d) are present and live-update the price summary — plan-30m shows ₹75 (60+15), plan-4h shows the required `You save ₹95 with this plan` (480+15-400=95) inside `price-summary`, total footer reflects ₹400; (5) Checkout navigates to /rental/billing?vehicleId=veh-1&hubId=hub-1&planId=4h&price=400&minutes=240 with `order-tilt-card`, `pay-wallet`, `pay-upi`, `pay-card`, and `confirm-payment-button` all visible; (6) Wallet is the default method, its sub-text reads 'Balance ₹250 · Low balance', `confirm-payment-button` label = 'Insufficient Wallet Balance' and aria-disabled=true; (7) switching to `pay-upi` enables the button (label='Confirm Payment & Unlock EV', aria-disabled=None); (8) tapping `confirm-payment-button` after ~900ms navigates to /active with `swipe-to-end-rental` visible and the seeded rental ticking (Ather 450X, 79 km, 86%, Duration counting). Regression-positive: the same flow also works with 1-hour plan (₹135) paid by wallet directly (wallet 250 > 135, button enabled by default). Web bundle builds; no react-native-maps crash. NOTE: swipe-to-end gesture via Playwright mouse drag did not fire onComplete in this run (same gesture-handler/web-PanGesture limitation noted in iteration 1) — this is a test-harness limitation, not a product regression. NOTE: Direct deep-link to /active (cold reload of the active screen url) throws an 'Attempted to navigate before mounting the Root Layout component' error from the useEffect redirect when no active rental exists; it self-recovers on next user nav but is worth fixing. Console still shows React 19 'element.ref' deprecation warnings inherited from iteration 1 OTP screen (not new).

react_native_issues.issue: On a hard load of `/active` when there is no active rental, the useEffect at `/app/frontend/app/(main)/active.tsx:30:25` calls `router.replace(...)` before the Root Layout has mounted, producing: 'Attempted to navigate before mounting the Root Layout component. Ensure the Root Layout component is rendering a Slot, or other navigator on the first render.' Wrap the redirect in a `useRootNavigationState()`-ready check (or move into a `Redirect` component / `setTimeout(..., 0)`) to defer until the router is mounted. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(main)/active.tsx:28-33.

Console error: 'Accessing element.ref was removed in React 19. ref is now a regular prop.' still fires on OTP screen render under react-native-web + React 19. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(auth)/otp.tsx callback ref on TextInput. Already reported in iteration 1; not new in iter 2 but still present.

action_items: Guard the `router.replace('/(main)/...')` call inside /app/frontend/app/(main)/active.tsx:30 so it only runs after the root navigator is mounted (e.g. check `useRootNavigationState()?.key` or use `<Redirect />`), to avoid the 'Attempted to navigate before mounting the Root Layout component' uncaught error visible on a cold load of /active without an active rental.

Optional polish: expose individual marker `testID`s on the web map stub (e.g. `ev-marker-veh-1`) so the 'Reserve button on a clicked EV pin → price-calculator' regression can be exercised directly on web. Today the code path is correct (home.tsx onReserve pushes to /price-calculator with vehicleId+hubId params, identical to the hub-ev tap path) but cannot be clicked from web preview.

Carry-over (iter1): fix React 19 `element.ref` warning on OTP screen, migrate `shadow*` to `boxShadow`, migrate `pointerEvents` prop to `style.pointerEvents`, and align expo SDK minor versions via `npx expo install --check`.
critical_code_review_comments: Price math in price-calculator.tsx is correct: meterPrice = minutes*pricePerMin (no unlock added when flatPrice), youSave = meterPrice+unlockFee - flatPrice. For veh-1 (₹2/min) with plan-4h: 240*2+15=495, flat=400, save=95 — matches required banner exactly.
Billing wallet-insufficient gating is implemented cleanly via `insufficient = method === 'wallet' && walletBalance < price`, disables the button and swaps the label — matches spec.
TiltCard / NeonOrb / Reanimated 3D effects degrade gracefully on web (no crashes observed; the orb and tilt cards render as static elevated cards).
ActiveRentalScreen has a redirect-on-mount that fires before the root navigator is ready when the screen is deep-linked directly — only crash observed in iter 2 testing.

All new testIDs (nearest-hub-button, hub-evs-heading, hub-ev-veh-1..n, ev-tilt-card, plan-30m/1h/4h/1d, price-summary, checkout-button, order-tilt-card, pay-wallet/upi/card, confirm-payment-button, billing-back, price-back) are present and stable.

success_rate.frontend: 11/11 iteration-2 acceptance criteria verified end-to-end; swipe-to-end gesture not fired via Playwright drag (test-harness limitation, not a regression).

seed_data_creation: Used mocked seed only: phone 9876543210, OTP 123456, Skip KYC → ACTIVE user with wallet ₹250. veh-1 = Ather 450X @ ₹2/min, hub-1 = Indiranagar 100ft Road with 4 EVs (2 of which are mapped to hub-1 = veh-1, veh-2).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-2 happy path (390x844): Phone 9876543210 → phone-continue-button → otp-digit-0..5 = '123456' → otp-verify-button (auto-advances) → kyc-skip → home. Use [data-testid="nearest-hub-button"] to open the hub sheet, then [data-testid="hub-ev-veh-1"] → price-calculator. plan-4h is the canonical test (₹400 flat, ₹95 save). At billing, wallet (₹250) is insufficient for ₹400 → confirm-payment-button label becomes 'Insufficient Wallet Balance' and aria-disabled='true'; switch to pay-upi to enable. confirm-payment-button replaces to /active after ~900 ms. Web Playwright mouse drag does not currently complete the swipe-to-end-rental gesture; ending the rental from the web preview is unreliable. Direct page load of /active triggers a benign 'navigate before mounting Root Layout' error on cold-start when no rental is active.
rca_of_issue: Only product-side issue observed: deep-linking to /(main)/active without an active rental crashes with 'Attempted to navigate before mounting the Root Layout component.' RCA: `useEffect(() => { if (!active) router.replace('/(main)/home') }, [active])` in /app/frontend/app/(main)/active.tsx fires on first render before expo-router's Root Layout finishes mounting. Repro: open the preview URL directly with path /active in a fresh tab. Mitigation: defer the replace until the router is ready (`useRootNavigationState()?.key` check) or use `<Redirect href="/(main)/home" />` instead of imperatively calling router.replace inside the effect.
